internal_thoughts:

parsed_output.justification: James's claims are logically inconsistent and contradictory. He claims to have robbed Mitchell's Insomniac role, but Mitchell confirms he woke up as the Insomniac, which would be impossible if James had robbed him. Furthermore, James contradicts himself regarding whether Paul switched him, first claiming Paul did and then claiming Paul was lying about it. These blatant falsehoods and erratic behavior strongly suggest James is the Werewolf attempting to divert suspicion toward Laura.
